message: Making you smile is my first priority and I promise to understand you more better. Often I say things which I dont mean and I sincerely apologize for that. I know I have been wrong at many places but I never stopped loving you. I have always been gratefull to have you. Because I know when no one will be there you will be. Holding your hands and walking thats it, thats  all I need. Another day of crushing 2% more on that pretty smile on your face. I Love You more more more more Nanne
